qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_esperanzaper as oi_esperanzaper, t0.e_semana as e_semana, t0.d_esperanzaper as d_esperanzaper, SEC.policy, t0.e_semana as CODE, t0.e_semana as TEXT, t0.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp FROM TTA11_ESPERANZAPER as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Esperanzaper.ESPERANZAPER\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_esperanzaper LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_esperanzaper asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_esperanzaper as oi_esperanzaper, SEC.policy FROM TTA11_ESPERANZAPER as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Esperanzaper.ESPERANZAPER\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_esperanzaper LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_esperanzaper asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Esperanzaper.ESPERANZAPER.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select TTA11_ESPERANZAPER.oi_esperanzaper as ID,TTA11_ESPERANZAPER.e_semana as COD,TTA11_ESPERANZAPER.e_semana as DES from TTA11_ESPERANZAPER Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@FIND-CODE='') {% %} {% and (DES={#SOURCE:@FIND-CODE} or COD={#SOURCE:@FIND-CODE}) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@FIND-PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@FIND-PARENT} %} %} order by COD asc')/ROWS/ROW[@_position<10]

method.label: Devuelve la fecha para cual corresponde la esperanza en funcion de una fecha para una persona
method.name: GetDateHope

method.label: Arma un xml para muchas personas y muchos dias para usar en reportes
method.name: XmlHope

method.label: Metodo para reporte de esparanza horaria
method.name: RepHope

resource.name: QRY_EsperanzaPersonalBorrar
resource.description: Retorna la esperanza Personal en formato para BORRAR

qry:select.name: qryMain
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT ns.version,
ep.oi_EsperanzaPer, ep.oi_personal_emp, ep.f_fechorainicio, ep.f_fechorafin, ep.oi_tipohora
FROM TTA11_EsperanzaPer as ep, nmd_security as ns
JOIN ep.oi_esperanzaper INNER ns.id
WHERE ns.class = \'NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Esperanzaper.ESPERANZAPER\' AND ep.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND ep.f_fechorainicio >= {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_fechorainicio)}
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Retorna las versiones de las esperanzas dentro de un rango.
resource.name: QRY_Versiones

qry:select.name: qryPersonal
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT ep.e_version, ep.f_FecHoraInicio, ep.f_FecHoraFin
FROM TTA11_EsperanzaPer as ep
WHERE ep.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND ep.f_FecHoraInicio >= {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_Inicio)} AND ep.f_FecHoraInicio < {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_Fin)}
ORDER BY f_fechorainicio ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryMain
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT ep.oi_tipoHora, ep.f_FecHoraInicio, ep.f_FecHoraFin, ep.oi_estructura, h.oi_horario, h.d_tipohorario, th.c_tipoHora, th.l_controla_fichada,
th.e_sumariza_aus, th.e_sumariza_pre
FROM TTA11_EsperanzaPer as ep, TTA01_TipoHoras as th, TTA02_Horarios as h
JOIN ep.oi_tipoHora INNER th.oi_tipoHora, ep.oi_Horario INNER h.oi_Horario
WHERE ep.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND ep.f_FecHoraInicio >= {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_Inicio)} AND ep.f_FecHoraInicio < {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_Fin)}
ORDER BY f_fechorainicio ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Retorna el XML necesario para la generación del HASH
resource.name: QRY_HASH

qry:select.name: qryCalendarios
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT cp.oi_personal_emp, cp.oi_calendario, cp.f_desde, cp.f_hasta
FROM PER02_CALENDARIO_PER as cp
WHERE cp.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_fin)} >= cp.f_desde AND ( {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_ini)} < cp.f_hasta OR IsNull(cp.f_hasta) )
ORDER BY oi_calendario ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryHorarios
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT hp.oi_personal_emp, hp.oi_horario, hp.f_fechaInicio, hp.f_fechaFin, hp.oi_escuadra
FROM TTA04_HORARIOSPERS as hp
WHERE hp.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_fin)} >= hp.f_fechaInicio AND ( {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_ini)} < hp.f_fechaFin OR IsNull(hp.f_fechaFin) )
ORDER BY f_fechaInicio ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryNovedades
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT n.oi_personal_emp, n.oi_novedad, n.f_fecha, n.e_horainicio, n.e_horafin, n.oi_tipohora, n.oi_estructura
FROM TTA04_NOVEDADES as n
WHERE n.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND n.f_fecha >= {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_ini)} AND n.f_fecha <= {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_fin)}
ORDER BY f_fecha ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryLicencias
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT lper.oi_personal_emp, lper.oi_licencia, lper.f_inicio, lper.f_fin, lper.f_interrupcion, th.oi_TipoHora
FROM PER02_LICEN_PER as lper, TTA01_TIPOHORAS as th, PER16_LICENCIAS as perl
JOIN perl.oi_licencia INNER lper.oi_licencia, th.oi_licencia INNER perl.oi_licencia
WHERE lper.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_fin)} >= lper.f_inicio AND ( {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_ini)} <= lper.f_fin OR IsNull(lper.f_fin) )
ORDER BY f_inicio ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryTiposHoraAut
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT tha.oi_personal_emp, tha.oi_tipohoraaut, tha.f_desde, tha.f_hasta, tha.e_horainicio, tha.e_horafin
FROM TTA04_TIPOSHORAAUT as tha
WHERE tha.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_fin)} >= tha.f_desde AND ( {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_ini)} <= tha.f_hasta OR IsNull(tha.f_hasta) )
ORDER BY f_desde ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryTiposHoras
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT th.oi_TipoHora, th.l_RequiereAut, th.e_sumariza_aus, th.e_sumariza_pre
FROM TTA01_TipoHoras as th
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <data oi_per="2" fd="20210401" fh="20210401" oi_hor="" presencias="1" licencias="1" ausencias="1" tardanzas="1" anuladas="" rango="0"><dia f="20210401" tipo="N" posicion="4" oi_calendario="1" oi_turno="1001" oi_escuadra="" oi_licencia="" afectado_nov="0" oi_horario="2" tipo_horario="F" ffrom="20210401000000" fto="20210402000000" esp="1"><fichadas-no-aparejadas><f oif="4516" /></fichadas-no-aparejadas><eventos><eve f="20210401" m="360" t="e" /><eve f="20210401" m="840" t="s" /></eventos></dia></data>
resource.name: QRY_RESOLVEDAY

qry:select.name: Persona
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select E.c_empresa, E.d_empresa, E.c_cuit, L.e_numero_legajo, P.d_ape_y_nom, P.c_nro_cuil, C.c_categoria, C.d_categoria, UBI.c_ubicacion, UBI.d_ubicacion, CC.c_centro_costo, CC.d_centro_costo, PU.c_puesto, PU.d_puesto, PO.c_posicion, PO.d_posicion, D.c_departamento, D.d_departamento, S.c_sector, S.d_sector from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as L, PER01_PERSONAL as P, ORG03_EMPRESAS as E, ORG18_CATEGORIAS as C, ORG03_UBICACIONES as UBI, ORG04_PUESTOS as PU, ORG08_CS_COSTO as CC, ORG04_POSICIONES as PO, ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS as D, ORG51_SECTORES as S join L.oi_personal inner P.oi_personal, L.oi_empresa inner E.oi_empresa, L.oi_categoria_ult left outer C.oi_categoria, L.oi_ubicacion LEFT OUTER UBI.oi_ubicacion, L.oi_ctro_costo_ult LEFT OUTER CC.oi_centro_costo, L.oi_puesto_ult LEFT OUTER PU.oi_puesto, L.oi_posicion_ult LEFT OUTER PO.oi_posicion, PO.oi_departamento LEFT OUTER D.oi_departamento, PO.oi_sector LEFT OUTER S.oi_sector where L.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@oi_per}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:attribute.value: iif((#SOURCE:../@presencias='0' AND #SOURCE:../@tardanzas='0' AND @pre='1') OR (#SOURCE:../@tardanzas='1' AND #SOURCE:../@presencias='0' AND @pre='1'AND @tar!='1') OR (#SOURCE:../@presencias!='1' AND #SOURCE:../@tardanzas='0' AND @tar='1') OR (#SOURCE:../@ausencias='0' AND @aus='1') OR (#SOURCE:../@licencias='0' AND @fra='1'), '1', '0')
qry:attribute.name: hts:delete

qry:select.name: Calendario
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select C.c_calendario, C.d_calendario from ORG27_CAL_FERIADOS as C where C.oi_calendario = {#SOURCE:@oi_calendario}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Turno
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select T.c_turno, T.d_turno from TTA14_TURNOS as T where T.oi_turno = {#SOURCE:@oi_turno}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Escuadra
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select T.c_escuadra, T.d_escuadra from TTA02_ESCUADRAS as T where T.oi_escuadra = {#SOURCE:@oi_escuadra}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Licencia
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia, PER16_LICENCIAS.c_licencia, PER16_LICENCIAS.d_licencia, PER02_LICEN_PER.f_inicio, PER02_LICEN_PER.f_fin, PER02_LICEN_PER.e_cant_dias, PER02_LICEN_PER.o_licencia_per
FROM PER16_LICENCIAS, PER02_LICEN_PER
WHERE PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia = PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia {%?(#SOURCE:@oi_licencia!='') {% AND PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia = {#SOURCE:@oi_licencia} %} {% %} %}
AND PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:../@oi_per} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.f_inicio <= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f)} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.f_fin >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Anuladas
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TTA07_FICHADASING.f_fechahora, TTA07_FICHADASING.c_tipo FROM TTA07_FICHADASING WHERE TTA07_FICHADASING.f_fechahora >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f)} AND TTA07_FICHADASING.f_fechahora < {Datetime(Number(Datetime(#SOURCE:@f))+1)} AND TTA07_FICHADASING.c_tipo != \'I\' AND TTA07_FICHADASING.c_estado = \'A\' AND TTA07_FICHADASING.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:../@oi_per} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Novedades
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TTA04_NOVEDADES.d_novedad, TTA04_NOVEDADES.e_horainicio, TTA04_NOVEDADES.e_horafin FROM TTA04_NOVEDADES WHERE TTA04_NOVEDADES.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:../@oi_per} AND TTA04_NOVEDADES.f_fecha = {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:attribute.value: iif(@obs='','',@obs+'|')+$r/@d_novedad + ' de ' + format_date(Number($r/@e_horainicio) DIV 1440, 'HH:MM') + ' a ' + format_date(Number($r/@e_horafin) DIV 1440, 'HH:MM')
qry:attribute.name: obs

qry:select.name: QRY_PARAM_TARD
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'Tard\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Proceso
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' select G.oi_grupo_th, sum(H.n_cantidadhs) as cant, max(H.oi_tipohora) as th
from TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS as P, TTA10_LIQUIDACJOR as F, TTA10_LIQUIDACPROC as H, TTA13_THS_GRUPO as G
join P.oi_liquidacionpers inner F.oi_liquidacionpers, F.oi_liquidacjor inner H.oi_liquidacjor, G.oi_tipohora inner H.oi_tipohora
where F.f_fecjornada={DateTime(#SOURCE:@fec)} and G.oi_grupo_th in ({%=#SOURCE:@oi_hor %}) and P.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@oi_per}
group by G.oi_grupo_th ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: TipoHora
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TTA01_TIPOHORAS.c_tipohora FROM TTA01_TIPOHORAS WHERE TTA01_TIPOHORAS.oi_tipohora = {#SOURCE:@th} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Total
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' select G.oi_grupo_th, sum(H.n_cantidadhs) as cant
from TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS as P, TTA10_LIQUIDACJOR as F, TTA10_LIQUIDACPROC as H, TTA13_THS_GRUPO as G
join P.oi_liquidacionpers inner F.oi_liquidacionpers, F.oi_liquidacjor inner H.oi_liquidacjor, G.oi_tipohora inner H.oi_tipohora
where F.f_fecjornada>={DateTime(#SOURCE:@fd)} and F.f_fecjornada<{Datetime(Number(DateTime(#SOURCE:@fh))+1)} and G.oi_grupo_th in ({%=#SOURCE:@oi_hor %}) and P.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@oi_per}
group by G.oi_grupo_th ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: TotPre
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #SOURCE:D[@pre=1]

qry:select.name: TotAus
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #SOURCE:D[@aus=1]

qry:select.name: TotTar
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #SOURCE:D[@e1t=1 OR @e3t=1]

qry:select.name: TotRet
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #SOURCE:D[@e2t=1 OR @e4t=1]

qry:select.name: Concepto
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_concepto, TTA15_CONCEPTOS.e_mostrar, TTA15_CONCEPTOS.c_unidad, TTA10_CONC_PER.n_valor as cant, TTA15_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto, TTA10_CONC_PER.e_clave FROM TTA10_CONC_PER, TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS, TTA15_CONCEPTOS JOIN TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_liquidacionpers INNER TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_liquidacionpers, TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_concepto INNER TTA15_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto WHERE TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@oi_per} AND TTA10_CONC_PER.e_clave = {#SOURCE:@fec} AND TTA15_CONCEPTOS.e_mostrar != 0 {%?(#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion!='') {% AND TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} %} {% %} %} AND TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_concepto in ({%=#SOURCE:@oi_conc%}) ORDER BY e_mostrar ASC, e_clave ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: TotalConc
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_concepto, TTA15_CONCEPTOS.c_unidad, SUM(TTA10_CONC_PER.n_valor) as cant FROM TTA10_CONC_PER, TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS, TTA15_CONCEPTOS JOIN TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_liquidacionpers INNER TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_liquidacionpers, TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_concepto INNER TTA15_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto WHERE TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@oi_per} {%?(#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion!='') {% AND TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} %} {% %} %} AND TTA10_CONC_PER.e_clave >={#SOURCE:@fd} AND TTA10_CONC_PER.e_clave <={#SOURCE:@fh} AND TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_concepto in ({%=#SOURCE:@oi_conc%}) AND TTA15_CONCEPTOS.e_mostrar != 0 GROUP BY TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_concepto, TTA15_CONCEPTOS.c_unidad ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: TotalConcMen
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_concepto, TTA15_CONCEPTOS.d_concepto, TTA15_CONCEPTOS.c_unidad, SUM(TTA10_CONC_PER.n_valor) as cant FROM TTA10_CONC_PER, TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS, TTA15_CONCEPTOS JOIN TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_liquidacionpers INNER TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_liquidacionpers, TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_concepto INNER TTA15_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto WHERE TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@oi_per} AND ISNULL(TTA10_CONC_PER.e_clave) AND TTA15_CONCEPTOS.c_coleccion = \'no\' {%?(#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion!='') {% AND TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} %} {% %} %} AND TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_concepto in ({%=#SOURCE:@oi_conc%}) AND TTA15_CONCEPTOS.e_mostrar != 0 GROUP BY TTA10_CONC_PER.oi_concepto, TTA15_CONCEPTOS.d_concepto, TTA15_CONCEPTOS.c_unidad ')/ROWS/ROW

method.name: CreateReportAssistencia
method.label: Metodo para Informe diaria de asistencias para un rango de fecha

resource.description: Retorna XMLs para precargar los datos necesarios para el calculo de la esperanza
resource.name: QRY_PRELOADHOPE

qry:select.name: qryCalendarios
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT cp.oi_personal_emp, cp.oi_calendario, cp.f_desde, cp.f_hasta
FROM PER02_CALENDARIO_PER as cp
WHERE cp.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emps %}) AND {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_fin)} >= cp.f_desde AND ( {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_ini)} < cp.f_hasta OR IsNull(cp.f_hasta) )
ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, oi_calendario ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryHorarios
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT hp.oi_personal_emp, hp.oi_horario, hp.f_fechaInicio, hp.f_fechaFin, hp.oi_escuadra
FROM TTA04_HORARIOSPERS as hp
WHERE hp.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emps %}) AND {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_fin)} >= hp.f_fechaInicio AND ( {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_ini)} < hp.f_fechaFin OR IsNull(hp.f_fechaFin) )
ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, f_fechaInicio ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryNovedades
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT n.oi_personal_emp, n.oi_novedad, n.f_fecha, n.e_horainicio, n.e_horafin, n.oi_tipohora, n.oi_estructura
FROM TTA04_NOVEDADES as n
WHERE n.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emps %}) AND n.f_fecha >= {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_ini)} AND n.f_fecha <= {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_fin)}
ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, f_fecha ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryLicencias
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT lper.oi_personal_emp, lper.oi_licencia, lper.f_inicio, lper.f_fin, lper.f_interrupcion, th.oi_TipoHora
FROM PER02_LICEN_PER as lper, TTA01_TIPOHORAS as th, PER16_LICENCIAS as perl
JOIN perl.oi_licencia INNER lper.oi_licencia, th.oi_licencia INNER perl.oi_licencia
WHERE lper.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emps %}) AND {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_fin)} >= lper.f_inicio AND ( {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_ini)} <= lper.f_fin OR IsNull(lper.f_fin) )
ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, f_inicio ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryTiposHoraAut
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT tha.oi_personal_emp, tha.oi_tipohoraaut, tha.f_desde, tha.f_hasta, tha.e_horainicio, tha.e_horafin
FROM TTA04_TIPOSHORAAUT as tha
WHERE tha.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emps %}) AND {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_fin)} >= tha.f_desde AND ( {DateTime(#PARAM:@f_ini)} <= tha.f_hasta OR IsNull(tha.f_hasta) )
ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, f_desde ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryTiposHoras
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql('
SELECT th.oi_TipoHora, th.l_RequiereAut, th.e_sumariza_aus, th.e_sumariza_pre
FROM TTA01_TipoHoras as th
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_PERSONA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa, CC.c_centro_costo, CC.d_centro_costo, P.c_puesto, P.d_puesto,PO.c_posicion, PO.d_posicion, D.c_departamento, D.d_departamento, S.c_sector, S.d_sector, UBI.c_ubicacion, UBI.d_ubicacion FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, ORG03_EMPRESAS, TTA04_PERSONAL, ORG03_UBICACIONES as UBI, ORG08_CS_COSTO as CC, ORG04_PUESTOS as P, ORG04_POSICIONES as PO, ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS as D, ORG51_SECTORES as S JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa, TTA04_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_ubicacion LEFT OUTER UBI.oi_ubicacion, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_ctro_costo_ult LEFT OUTER CC.oi_centro_costo, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_puesto_ult LEFT OUTER P.oi_puesto, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_posicion_ult LEFT OUTER PO.oi_posicion, PO.oi_departamento LEFT OUTER D.oi_departamento, PO.oi_sector LEFT OUTER S.oi_sector WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_HORARIO
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT TTA02_HORARIOS.c_horario, TTA02_HORARIOS.d_horario, TTA04_HORARIOSPERS.f_fechaFin, TTA04_HORARIOSPERS.f_fechaInicio AS f_fechaInicio, TTA04_HORARIOSPERS.oi_personal_emp FROM TTA04_HORARIOSPERS, TTA02_HORARIOS JOIN TTA04_HORARIOSPERS.oi_horario INNER TTA02_HORARIOS.oi_horario WHERE TTA04_HORARIOSPERS.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@id} AND TTA04_HORARIOSPERS.f_fechaInicio <= NOW() ORDER BY f_fechaInicio asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_FICHADA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT TTA07_FICHADASING.f_fechahora FROM TTA07_FICHADASING WHERE TTA07_FICHADASING.c_estado != \'A\' AND TTA07_FICHADASING.f_fechahora >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@fecha)} AND TTA07_FICHADASING.f_fechahora <= {Datetime(Number(Datetime(#SOURCE:@fecha))+1)} AND TTA07_FICHADASING.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_PRESENTE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT MAX(TTA07_FICHADASING.f_fechahora) as f_fechahora, TTA07_FICHADASING.c_tipo FROM TTA07_FICHADASING WHERE TTA07_FICHADASING.c_estado != \'A\' AND TTA07_FICHADASING.f_fechahora <= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@fechahora)} AND TTA07_FICHADASING.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@id} GROUP BY TTA07_FICHADASING.c_tipo ORDER BY f_fechahora ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #SOURCE:dia

resource.declare: <DIAS max_dia_mes="31" e_periodo="202001"><DIAS><DIA max="6" dia="1" /><DIA max="4" dia="2" /><DIA max="4" dia="3" /><DIA max="0" dia="4" /><DIA max="0" dia="5" /><DIA max="4" dia="6" /><DIA max="4" dia="7" /><DIA max="4" dia="8" /><DIA max="4" dia="9" /><DIA max="4" dia="10" /><DIA max="0" dia="11" /><DIA max="0" dia="12" /><DIA max="4" dia="13" /><DIA max="4" dia="14" /><DIA max="4" dia="15" /><DIA max="4" dia="16" /><DIA max="4" dia="17" /><DIA max="0" dia="18" /><DIA max="0" dia="19" /><DIA max="4" dia="20" /><DIA max="4" dia="21" /><DIA max="4" dia="22" /><DIA max="4" dia="23" /><DIA max="4" dia="24" /><DIA max="0" dia="25" /><DIA max="0" dia="26" /><DIA max="4" dia="27" /><DIA max="4" dia="28" /><DIA max="2" dia="29" /><DIA max="4" dia="30" /><DIA max="2" dia="31" /></DIAS><DIAS><DIA max="4" dia="1" /><DIA max="0" dia="2" /><DIA max="4" dia="3" /><DIA max="0" dia="4" /><DIA max="0" dia="5" /><DIA max="4" dia="6" /><DIA max="4" dia="7" /><DIA max="4" dia="8" /><DIA max="4" dia="9" /><DIA max="4" dia="10" /><DIA max="0" dia="11" /><DIA max="0" dia="12" /><DIA max="4" dia="13" /><DIA max="4" dia="14" /><DIA max="4" dia="15" /><DIA max="4" dia="16" /><DIA max="4" dia="17" /><DIA max="0" dia="18" /><DIA max="0" dia="19" /><DIA max="4" dia="20" /><DIA max="4" dia="21" /><DIA max="4" dia="22" /><DIA max="4" dia="23" /><DIA max="4" dia="24" /><DIA max="0" dia="25" /><DIA max="0" dia="26" /><DIA max="4" dia="27" /><DIA max="4" dia="28" /><DIA max="4" dia="29" /><DIA max="4" dia="30" /><DIA max="4" dia="31" /></DIAS></DIAS>
resource.name: QRY_MAXIMO_DIAS

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SECUENCE('INT,1,{%=#SOURCE:@max_dia_mes%},1')/ROWS/ROW

CreateReportPlanificacionPorPeriodo

qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('

resource.name: QRY_HORARIOS_DESC_LEGAL
resource.declare: <data oi_per="1429" fd="20200101" fh="20200131"> <dia f="20200101" tipo="N" posicion="3" oi_calendario="1" oi_turno="1005" oi_escuadra="" oi_licencia="" afectado_nov="0" qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #SOURCE:dia

qry:select.name: qry_pegar_eventos
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #SOURCE:eve

qry:select.name: qry_legajo
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Esperanzaper.DIA.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select TTA11_DIAS.oi_dia as ID,TTA11_DIAS.f_dia as COD,TTA11_DIAS.f_dia as DES,TTA11_DIAS.oi_esperanzaper as PARENT from TTA11_DIAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@FIND-CODE='') {% %} {% and (DES={#SOURCE:@FIND-CODE} or COD={#SOURCE:@FIND-CODE}) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@FIND-PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@FIND-PARENT} %} %} order by COD asc')/ROWS/ROW[@_position<10]

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Esperanzaper.DETALLE.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select TTA11_DETALLE.oi_detalle as ID,TTA11_DETALLE.e_horainicio as COD,TTA11_DETALLE.e_horainicio as DES,TTA11_DETALLE.oi_dia as PARENT from TTA11_DETALLE Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@FIND-CODE='') {% %} {% and (DES={#SOURCE:@FIND-CODE} or COD={#SOURCE:@FIND-CODE}) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@FIND-PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@FIND-PARENT} %} %} order by COD asc')/ROWS/ROW[@_position<10]
